keyPoints: AdaBoost: AdaBoost is a meta-learning algorithm that combines multiple weak models to create a strong one.
Stumping: Stumping is a technique used in AdaBoost where a weak model is added to the ensemble to correct the errors of the previous weak models.
Subagging: Subagging is a type of bagging where the training dataset is split into sub-samples and then each sub-sample is used to train a weak model.
Random Subagging: Random Subagging is a type of bagging where the training dataset is randomly split into sub-samples and then each sub-sample is used to train a weak model.
